description_long: This house features a symmetrical facade with two prominent gabled roofs and a covered front porch supported by columns. The entryway is accessed by a set of steps leading through a low, white perimeter fence, flanked by manicured hedges and two large, round topiary bushes on either side. The exterior walls are painted a muted gray, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The property is surrounded by a lush garden with several mature trees and a well-maintained lawn. The rear and sides of the house are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern residential architecture, with an emphasis on symmetry and curb appeal.
description: A symmetrical two-story house with twin gabled roofs, a covered front porch, and a landscaped garden enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, steps, topiary bushes, and symmetrical gabled roofs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the garden area, and the rear portion of the property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with minimal windows and simple landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, garden, and fence, with less detail on the entryway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, covered porch, columns, and decorative topiary bushes
